lorebook.name: The Slow Thing
lorebook.description: Glimpse World lorebook for The Slow Thing — part of The Endless

entries.name: [Location] Glimpse World — The Slow Thing
entries.content: The Slow Thing world is a Glimpse World consisting of a vast flat desert of fine black sand under a sky containing two suns positioned at different heights. The light they cast together produces no shadows. The air is warm and dry and completely still. In the far distance, visible from the door's arrival point, something very large is moving very slowly across the horizon. It is too far away to identify. It is clearly alive or at least in motion. It has never gotten closer in any documented visit regardless of how long a traveler stays or whether they move toward it. It has never stopped moving. No traveler has reached it. The black sand shows no footprints other than the traveler's own. There is nothing else in this world that has been found.
